prose:
Frontier‐orbital energies of TEMPO

Method provenance
• Property: HOMO, LUMO, and Koopmans‐style HOMO–LUMO gap (electronic energies, eV)
• Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density fitting)
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz; treated as a fixed geometry (single-point calculation, no re-optimization)
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
• Charge = 0, multiplicity = 2 (doublet, UKS)
• Software: PySCF (backend invoked via chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill)
• SCF convergence: converged in 12 cycles
• Engine warnings: none (the `warnings` array is empty)
• Live engine log streamed during the run to the file `frontier_*.out`; final JSON result at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8hpxqn1d/live.json.

Results (eV)
• HOMO energy ............ −6.3375439
• LUMO energy ............ −2.4651235
• HOMO–LUMO gap .......... 3.8724203   ← headline value

This result is flagged as trustworthy by the engine integrity checks, with all tests passed and no warnings surfaced.
